scripts.start: concurrently -n react,angular,angular-v18,shell -c blue,magenta,cyan,green "npm start -w remote-react" "npm start -w remote-angular" "npm --prefix remote-angular-v18 start" "npm start -w shell"
scripts.build: npm run build -w remote-react && npm run build -w remote-angular && npm --prefix remote-angular-v18 run build && npm run build -w shell
